Recyclable Objects: a photo of a recyclable object, like a bottle, can, or cardboard box
a photo of plastic, glass, paper, or metal waste
Electronic Objects: a photo of an electronic device, like a phone, laptop, or cable
a photo of e-waste or a broken electronic gadget
Organic Objects: a photo of organic waste, like food scraps, fruit, or vegetables
a photo of a plant, leaf, or biodegradable material
